en.name: Reaction Time
en.desc: Test your reaction speed with precision timing
en.description: Reaction Time is the ultimate test of your reflexes! Wait for the visual signal to appear, then click as fast as you possibly can. Your reaction time is measured in milliseconds, giving you precise feedback on your reflex speed. Compare your times with friends, track your improvement, and see how you stack up against the average human reaction time of about 250ms!
en.objectives: Click as quickly as possible when the visual signal appears. Achieve the fastest reaction time possible. Track your progress across multiple attempts and try to consistently improve your average response time.
en.howToPlay: Wait for the screen to turn green, then click anywhere as fast as possible. Track your best times and compete with friends. How fast can you react?

rules.controls: Click or tap anywhere when the signal appears. Keyboard users can press any key. The timer starts when the signal appears and stops when you click.
mechanics: Wait for the green signal to appear
Click immediately when you see it
features: Statistics View - See your average and best

tips: Keep your hand ready on the mouse/click button
Focus on the screen - don't get distracted
Try to maintain consistency rather than one lucky fast time

faq.question: What's considered a fast reaction time?
faq.answer: Average is around 250ms. Good is 200-220ms. Very good is 150-200ms. Excellent is under 150ms. Professional esports players often have times under 150ms.

faq.question: Why do my times vary?
faq.answer: Human reaction time naturally varies based on alertness, focus, anticipation, and even time of day. Taking 5+ attempts gives a more accurate average.

faq.question: Can training improve reaction time?
faq.answer: Yes! Regular practice, good sleep, and staying relaxed all help. Most improvement comes from eliminating wasted time rather than increasing raw neural speed.

faq.question: How do professionals have such fast times?
faq.answer: Professional gamers develop muscle memory and learn to anticipate cues. They also maintain peak physical condition and eliminate all unnecessary movements.

zh.name: 反应时间
zh.desc: 用精确计时测试你的反应速度
zh.description: 反应时间是测试反射神经的终极挑战！等待视觉信号出现，然后尽可能快地点击。你的反应时间以毫秒测量，给你的反射速度提供精确反馈。与朋友比较时间，追踪你的进步，看看你与普通人的约250毫秒反应时间相比如何！
zh.objectives: 当视觉信号出现时尽可能快地点击。达到尽可能快的反应时间。在多次尝试中追踪你的进度，尝试持续改善你的平均响应时间。
zh.howToPlay: 等待屏幕变绿，然后尽快点击任何位置。记录你的最佳时间并与朋友竞争。你能多快反应？

rules.controls: 当信号出现时点击或轻触任何位置。键盘用户可以按任意键。计时器从信号出现开始，到你点击时停止。
mechanics: 多次尝试建立你的平均值
features: 毫秒精度 - 精确测量
最佳时间追踪 - 监控进步
统计视图 - 查看你的平均和最佳
基准比较 - 了解你的水平

tips: 保持手在鼠标/点击按钮上准备
专注于屏幕 - 不要分心
尝试保持一致性而不是一个幸运的快速时间
目标是200毫秒以下 - 那是优秀的成绩！

faq.question: 什么是快速反应时间？
faq.answer: 平均约250毫秒。好是200-220毫秒。很好是150-200毫秒。优秀是150毫秒以下。职业电竞选手通常有150毫秒以下的时间。

faq.question: 为什么我的时间会变化？
faq.answer: 人类反应时间因警觉性、注意力、预期甚至一天中的时间而自然变化。进行5次以上尝试可以得到更准确的平均值。

faq.question: 训练可以改善反应时间吗？
faq.answer: 是的！定期练习、良好的睡眠和保持放松都有帮助。大多数改善来自消除浪费时间而非增加原始神经速度。

faq.question: 专业人士怎么有这么快的时间？
faq.answer: 职业玩家发展肌肉记忆并学会预判提示。他们也保持巅峰身体状态并消除所有不必要的动作。
